scripts.dev:app: concurrently -k -s first -n shared,wait,server,web "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared dev" "wait-on packages/shared/dist/index.js && node -e \"setInterval(()=>{},1<<30)\"" "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-server dev" "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-web dev"
scripts.dev:server: concurrently -k -s first -n shared,wait,server "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared dev" "wait-on packages/shared/dist/index.js && node -e \"setInterval(()=>{},1<<30)\"" "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-server dev"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -s first -n shared,wait,web "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared dev" "wait-on packages/shared/dist/index.js && node -e \"setInterval(()=>{},1<<30)\"" "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-web dev"
scripts.dev:cli: concurrently -k -s first -n shared,wait,cli "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-shared dev" "wait-on packages/shared/dist/index.js && node -e \"setInterval(()=>{},1<<30)\"" "npm run -w @asimov/minimal-cli dev"
